data.body: Plan-review evidence (782 runs / 225 tickets post-recal 96f5f374a): 55% pass round 1, 18% need 4+ rounds; sticky tail = 60% of gate compute. 38 PASS->BLOCK flips: 22 remediation-induced, 16 sampling-miss; 32% verdict instability on byte-identical plans. Remediation non-convergent: 95% of edits spawn new findings (net +324 over 430 edit rounds, ~13 advisories/round). Thresholds look correct (blocks land on deliberately-promoted T8/G1G2/E4/G6); dominant mechanism = missing cross-round novelty/convergence floor (code-review already has one, e05c4b531; epic 7d43-49c5 designed the plan-review equivalent). Awaiting config-map, completion-verifier, and Gerrit agents.
